data.content: India was never "discovered" in the way the term is often used for lands unknown to locals but later encountered by outsiders. India has been inhabited for thousands of years and has a continuous civilization dating back to the Indus Valley Civilization around 2500 BCE. European explorers, such as Vasco da Gama, reached the Indian subcontinent by sea in 1498, marking the beginning of direct maritime contact between Europe and India.
